title: decalepis khasiana
intro: Decalepis khasiana, also known as the 'root beer plant', is a perennial plant belonging to the Asclepiadaceae family. It is native to the Western Ghats of India and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Decalepis khasiana include reducing stress, improving digestion, and providing relief from various respiratory issues. The plant is used to prepare herbal teas, decoctions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
